name: Phantasmal Mask
description:
This model gains the following ability:

Essence Theft: When this model activates, it may discard this upgrade to heal 2.

This model gains the following action:

granted_abilities.name: Essence Theft
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard this upgrade to heal 2.

granted_actions.name: Protective Spirits
granted_actions.effects: Either heal 2 on all allies in range, or heal 3 on a single ally within range. Discard this upgrade.

granted_actions.name: "Take This!"
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose an Artifact upgrade attached to this model. Ally only.
granted_actions.effects: Attach the chosen upgrade to the target.

extraction_notes: The description field contains both the introductory text and the Essence Theft ability introduction because they are formatted as body text rather than separate sections.
Protective Spirits has a choice-based effect for different healing amounts.
"Take This!" has italicized restriction text specifying Ally only and the choice requirement.
